title: I Will Always Love You
meaning_summary: I Will Always Love You still dominates because it pairs emotional clarity with one of the most recognizable vocal performances in pop history.
revenue_drivers: The song remains a global streaming and catalog-ballad staple.
Its Bodyguard association keeps soundtrack and film-linked discovery active.
Weddings, tribute culture, and media reuse extend long-tail demand.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes ongoing global streaming, soundtrack-linked listening, legacy radio value, and licensing demand.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not publicly modeled as a fully sold-out catalog position
ownership.notes: Artist-side economics are modeled from performance and master participation assumptions, not private royalty statements.
